emails.subject: FW: Status of EWS Litigation
emails.body: FW: Status of EWS Litigation FYI

emails.subject: RE: Status of EWS Litigation
emails.body: RE: Status of EWS Litigation Jim: Thanks for forwarding this to me---this helps me with our ongoing (seemingly daily!) disclosure issues. Considering the confidential nature of these litigation memos, and the fact that Andy probably doesn't know who the heck I am(and probably doesn't care!), would you ask him to include me on his distribution list? I think he will be more comfortable getting the request from you. Thanks, Rex.

emails.subject: RE: Status of EWS Litigation
emails.body: Rex, I will ask him to include you on the list. Jim
